example_cases.description: setup_pet_window sets transparent, always-on-top, and initial click-through properties via X11
example_cases.expected_output: Returns ok=true. X11 mock verifies: _NET_WM_WINDOW_TYPE set to utility, _NET_WM_STATE includes above, XShape input region set.
example_cases.setup: Mock x11rb connection. Create mock window ID.

example_cases.description: set_click_through updates XShape input regions to only include specified rects (sprite + bubbles)
example_cases.expected_output: X11 mock verifies XShape input region is the union of the two rects. All other areas pass through.
example_cases.setup: Mock x11rb connection with window already set up.

example_cases.description: Click-through regions update does not intercept keyboard events (INV-003)
example_cases.input: After setup_pet_window, verify X11 input shape does not include keyboard grab
example_cases.expected_output: No keyboard event grab registered. Only pointer/click regions defined via XShape.
example_cases.setup: Mock x11rb connection. Verify no XGrabKey calls made.

example_cases.description: focus_terminal finds and focuses GNOME Terminal window by project PID
example_cases.expected_output: Returns { success: true, fallback_used: false }. X11 mock verifies XRaiseWindow + XSetInputFocus called.
example_cases.setup: Mock X11 window list with one gnome-terminal-server window whose PID cwd matches project_dir.

example_cases.description: focus_terminal finds Alacritty window by project directory
example_cases.setup: Mock X11 window list with alacritty window matching project_dir.

example_cases.description: focus_terminal falls back to opening project directory when terminal not found
example_cases.expected_output: Returns { success: true, fallback_used: true }. xdg-open called with project_dir.
example_cases.setup: Mock X11 window list with no terminal windows matching the project.

example_cases.description: open_pr_url extracts recent PR URL from git remote and opens in browser
example_cases.setup: Mock git CLI to return remote URL and recent PR number. Mock xdg-open.

example_cases.description: open_pr_url returns NoPrFound when no recent PR exists
example_cases.input: open_pr_url(project_dir) where git has no recent PR activity
example_cases.setup: Mock git CLI returning no PR-related output.

example_cases.description: open_pr_url returns NoRemote when directory has no git remote
example_cases.input: open_pr_url(project_dir) where git repo has no remote configured
example_cases.setup: Mock git CLI returning empty remote list.

example_cases.description: register_hotkey registers a global hotkey successfully
example_cases.expected_output: Returns registered=true. X11 mock verifies XGrabKey called with correct keycode/modmask.

example_cases.description: register_hotkey returns HotkeyConflict when key combo already in use
example_cases.input: register_hotkey with a key_combo that X11 reports as already grabbed
example_cases.setup: Mock x11rb XGrabKey to return AlreadyGrabbed error.

example_cases.description: save_pet_position persists coordinates to DB config
example_cases.expected_output: DB config contains pet_position_x=500 and pet_position_y=300
example_cases.setup: Init DB. Call save_pet_position then verify via get_config.

example_cases.description: Hotkey response time is under 300ms from keypress to dialog display
example_cases.input: Simulate hotkey press and measure time until show_input event emitted
example_cases.setup: Register hotkey. Set up event listener with timestamp recording.

example_cases.description: setup_pet_window returns WindowNotFound for invalid window ID
example_cases.setup: Mock x11rb returning BadWindow error for the ID.
